# Blog - **<TITLE/OUTPUT NAME>**

Thank you for contributing to our blog!

Use this issue to suggest and track blog post suggestions for [rcmcooperative.com/blog](https://www.rcmcooperative.com/blog/)

Add details below and check off each item when completed.
Add further details (for example translation or design needs) and break out into sub-issues where necessary.

## Main info
- [ ] Confirm audience:
- [ ] Target publish date:
- [ ] Confirm any funder/partner acknowledgement requirements

## Drafting and review
- [ ] Sources to be included (list below)
- [ ] Draft prepared: use the [template available here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1fvYigRMgR-k0rPTx62ZSZA4QxSeipQTGSByHHnj1aI0/edit?usp=sharing) and add the link for your drafting area in this issue
- [ ] Draft reviewed by core member: 
- [ ] Approved for publication

## Publication
- [ ] Published link: 
- [ ] Shared internally/announced to team via slack
- [ ] Shared externally (add links)
